category.name: Premium Time
category.description: Premium Time enhances your account with premium areas, transportation, more spells, house rental, guild creation, offline training and larger depots. It is valid for all characters on this account and is activated immediately after purchase.

offer.name: 30 Days of Premium Time
offer.description: Adds 30 days of Premium Time to your account immediately.

offer.name: 90 Days of Premium Time
offer.description: Adds 90 days of Premium Time to your account immediately.

offer.name: 180 Days of Premium Time
offer.description: Adds 180 days of Premium Time to your account immediately.

offer.name: 360 Days of Premium Time
offer.description: Adds 360 days of Premium Time to your account immediately.

category.name: Battle Pass
category.description: Deluxe Battle Pass unlocks the premium reward track for the current Battle Pass season. It is activated immediately for the purchasing character.

offer.name: Deluxe Battle Pass
offer.description: Unlocks the Deluxe Battle Pass reward track for the current season.

category.name: Blessings
category.description: Blessings reduce experience, skill and equipment loss when your character dies. They are added directly to your character and cannot exceed the regular blessing limit.

offer.name: All regular Blessings
offer.description: Adds all missing regular blessings to your character.

offer.name: The Spiritual Shielding
offer.description: Adds The Spiritual Shielding blessing to your character.

offer.name: The Embrace of Tibia
offer.description: Adds The Embrace of Tibia blessing to your character.

offer.name: The Fire of the Suns
offer.description: Adds The Fire of the Suns blessing to your character.

offer.name: The Wisdom of Solitude
offer.description: Adds The Wisdom of Solitude blessing to your character.

offer.name: The Spark of the Phoenix
offer.description: Adds The Spark of the Phoenix blessing to your character.

category.name: Potions
category.description: Potions are delivered directly to your character. Make sure you have enough inventory room before buying.

offer.name: Mana Potion
offer.description: Restores mana. This package contains 125 mana potions.

offer.name: Mana Potion
offer.description: Restores mana. This package contains 300 mana potions.

offer.name: Strong Mana Potion
offer.description: Restores mana. This package contains 100 strong mana potions.

offer.name: Strong Mana Potion
offer.description: Restores mana. This package contains 250 strong mana potions.

offer.name: Great Mana Potion
offer.description: Restores mana. This package contains 100 great mana potions.

offer.name: Great Mana Potion
offer.description: Restores mana. This package contains 250 great mana potions.

offer.name: Health Potion
offer.description: Restores hit points. This package contains 125 health potions.

offer.name: Health Potion
offer.description: Restores hit points. This package contains 300 health potions.

offer.name: Strong Health Potion
offer.description: Restores hit points. This package contains 100 strong health potions.

offer.name: Strong Health Potion
offer.description: Restores hit points. This package contains 250 strong health potions.

offer.name: Great Health Potion
offer.description: Restores hit points. This package contains 100 great health potions.

offer.name: Great Health Potion
offer.description: Restores hit points. This package contains 250 great health potions.

category.name: Equipment
category.description: Equipment and containers delivered directly to your character.

category.name: Weapons
category.description: Weapons are delivered directly to your character. Make sure you have enough inventory room before buying.

offer.name: Magic Sword
offer.description: A legendary sword also known as the Sword of Valor.

offer.name: Fire Axe
offer.description: An axe with a blade wrapped in magical flame.

category.name: Backpacks
category.description: Backpacks are delivered directly to your character. Make sure you have enough inventory room before buying.

offer.name: Feedbag
offer.description: A reinforced backpack crafted for warriors. It has 20 container slots and reduces the weight of items stored inside by 30 percent.

category.name: Outfits
category.description: Outfits are unlocked directly on your character and include all addons. Both male and female look types are granted when available.

offer.name: Elementalist Outfit
offer.description: Unlocks the Elementalist outfit with all addons.

offer.name: Deepling Outfit
offer.description: Unlocks the Deepling outfit with all addons.

offer.name: Insectoid Outfit
offer.description: Unlocks the Insectoid outfit with all addons.

offer.name: Entrepreneur Outfit
offer.description: Unlocks the Entrepreneur outfit with all addons.

category.name: Mounts
category.description: Mounts are unlocked directly on your character. Once purchased, you can use them from the outfit window.

offer.name: Widow Queen
offer.description: Unlocks the Widow Queen mount.

offer.name: Racing Bird
offer.description: Unlocks the Racing Bird mount.

offer.name: War Bear
offer.description: Unlocks the War Bear mount.

offer.name: Black Sheep
offer.description: Unlocks the Black Sheep mount.

category.name: Hirelings
category.description: Hirelings are personal NPC assistants for houses. They are delivered as lamps to the purchasing character's Store Inbox.

offer.name: Hireling Apprentice
offer.description: Creates a hireling lamp for your Store Inbox. The lamp can only be used in a house owned by the purchasing character.

offer.name: Hireling Banker
offer.description: Gives your hirelings the banker skill.

offer.name: Hireling Cook
offer.description: Gives your hirelings the cooking skill.

offer.name: Hireling Steward
offer.description: Gives your hirelings the steward skill.

offer.name: Hireling Trader
offer.description: Gives your hirelings the trader skill.

category.name: Hireling Dresses
category.description: Dresses can only be used by hirelings of the purchasing character. Colours can be changed in the hireling outfit window.

offer.name: Banker Dress
offer.description: Unlocks the Banker Dress for your hirelings.

offer.name: Trader Dress
offer.description: Unlocks the Trader Dress for your hirelings.

offer.name: Cook Dress
offer.description: Unlocks the Cook Dress for your hirelings.

offer.name: Steward Dress
offer.description: Unlocks the Steward Dress for your hirelings.

offer.name: Servant Dress
offer.description: Unlocks the Servant Dress for your hirelings.

offer.name: Hydra Dress
offer.description: Unlocks the Hydra Dress for your hirelings.

offer.name: Ferumbras Dress
offer.description: Unlocks the Ferumbras Dress for your hirelings.

offer.name: Bonelord Dress
offer.description: Unlocks the Bonelord Dress for your hirelings.

offer.name: Dragon Dress
offer.description: Unlocks the Dragon Dress for your hirelings.

category.name: Extra Services
category.description: Character services are applied directly to the purchasing character.

offer.name: Name Change
offer.description: Choose a new name for your current character.

offer.name: Sex Change
offer.description: Changes your current character from female to male, or from male to female.

category.name: Task Hunt
category.description: Task Hunt boosts and permanent weekly task upgrades. These offers are available only on AstraClient.

offer.name: Bounty Double Kill Boost (1H)
offer.description: Bounty task kills count twice for one hour.

offer.name: Weekly Double Kill Boost (1H)
offer.description: Weekly kill task progress counts twice for one hour.

offer.name: Reduced Weekly Bounty Items
offer.description: Halves the required amounts of unfinished weekly delivery tasks and applies to newly generated tasks for one hour.

offer.name: Permanent Weekly Task Expansion
offer.description: Permanently expands weekly kill and delivery tasks from 6 to 9 slots.
